basics.name: Giovanni Salinas Villa
basics.label: Computer Engineer
basics.summary: My name is Giovanni Salinas Villa. I am 24 years old and a Computer Engineer. I have experience integrating APIs and a solid command of programming languages. Alongside my studies, I have pursued self-directed learning in cybersecurity, exploring various methodologies and tools to protect systems and information from digital threats. I have experience with continuous integration tools like Git and Jira, and I enjoy collaborating with teams to develop solutions that are both scalable and efficient.

work.name: Entel
work.summary: Trainee Developer at Entel within the technology area. Currently participating in initiatives related to data analysis and artificial intelligence, collaborating with the team on developing data-based solutions, learning new technological tools, and applying software development best practices.

work.name: Patrimore
work.summary: Frontend developer focused on building functional, accessible, and responsive web interfaces. I work with modern tools and AI assistance to optimize the construction of components, screens, and flows. Responsible for validating and refining generated code, maintaining best development practices in agile and collaborative environments.

work.name: Infos Ltda
work.summary: Installation technician with experience in medium voltage (MV) installation and all types of cabling: fiber optics, networks, audio, and electrical. Specialized in equipment maintenance, remote troubleshooting, and configuration/installation of servers, racks, DVR cameras, switches, and routers. Committed to delivering efficient, high-quality solutions, ensuring proper operation and performance of installed systems.

work.name: TestGroup
work.summary: Information Systems Security internship, acquiring key knowledge in protecting IT infrastructure and managing security risks. Committed to continuous learning in the business context.

work.name: TRES60
work.summary: Assistant Technician at Anglo American mine, Los Bronces. Work with Rajant system, point-to-point links in the mine, CAS-Cam system, CCTV, and telecommunications systems in the fleet.

volunteer.summary: I volunteered at AWS Community Day, an event that brings together the community of developers, architects, engineers, and technology enthusiasts to explore the latest innovations and best practices in Amazon Web Services (AWS) cloud computing. During this event, I had the opportunity to collaborate on various activities, from organizing spaces to assisting attendees and facilitating multiple sessions and workshops.
